title: B10. Mean-Field Lattice Gas Occupancy
label: mx1_transmute_06
task_text:
Solve this Super-Eywa grading-bank question.
Question ID: architecture-derived-B10-mean-field-lattice-gas-occupancy
Title: B10. Mean-Field Lattice Gas Occupancy

Problem:
Grand canonical ensemble, mean-field approximation.

Given:

- e = -(k_B T)/(2*pi)
- mu = 0.1 * k_B T
- z_h = 4
- z_v = 8
- T = 300 K

Find occupancy <n>.

Grading target:
Numerical match within 0.01.

Return format:
FINAL_ANSWER: <your answer>
JUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>
root_result_excerpt:
The problem describes a mean-field lattice gas model in the grand canonical ensemble. I have formalized the self-consistent equation for the occupancy <n> based on the provided energy parameter and coordination numbers.
node_root_helper_01 (transmuted_child): Perform a numerical solution for the mean-field occupancy <n> of a lattice gas system in the grand canonical ensemble. Physical Model: Mean-
final_result_excerpt:
FINAL_ANSWER: 0.564
JUSTIFICATION: Numerical solution of n = 1 / (exp(-6/pi * n - 0.1) + 1).
